title: Fxded's Simplicity
description: Fxded’s Simplicity is a clean, performance-friendly quality-of-life and PvP resource pack that enhances Minecraft’s visuals while keeping its classic feel. Designed for clarity, smoothness, and beauty — it looks amazing with shaders and plays even better.
body:
Fxded’s Simplicity

A clean, all-around QoL and PvP resource pack built for smooth, modern gameplay.

Fxded’s Simplicity takes the best parts of Minecraft’s default look and streamlines it into a sharper, cleaner, and more readable experience. Whether you’re grinding in survival, fighting in PvP, or building with shaders on, this pack makes everything feel crisp and effortless.

✨ Features:

Polished simplicity: Every texture redesigned for clarity and comfort without losing Minecraft’s soul.

PvP-ready visuals: Clear swords, distinct armor, easy-to-see particles, and minimal visual noise.

Quality of Life improvements: Cleaner GUI, smoother icons, better inventory readability, and smart tweaks that just feel right.

Shader compatible: Colors and lighting are perfectly balanced to look incredible with any shader pack.

Lightweight and fast: Keeps your FPS high while still looking amazing.

🎮 Perfect For:

Players who love simple, modern visuals

Anyone wanting a competitive edge in PvP

Survival players looking for aesthetic + clarity

Those who use shaders and want a cohesive look
